text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After training, I visit the library to do some
research.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: The world is so marvelous! ☆ Life is marvelous! ★

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... The day's almost over, but you're still as
happy as ever...

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's you, Nature!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Don't you feel marvelous today? I'm feeling quite
marvelous, myself! ☆

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah... I'd say I'm feeling the same as usual.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What are you writing? "Marvelous World..."

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: It's my Marvelous World Plan!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
The world is filled with marvelous things!
However, no one seems to realize it! It's such a
shame!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Uh, it feels too late to ask, but I'm not quite sure
what you mean by "marvelous."

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Marvelous means something that astounds you!
Miracles, happiness, good fortune! These are
marvelous!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Think for a moment. In the beginning, there was
the big bang, right? Do you know what the
chances of the Earth forming were? One in ten to
the hundred-and-fifty-thousandth power!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
And the chances that life would spring up was
only one in ten to the forty-thousandth power!
What else can you call that besides an absolute
miracle?!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
And to think that Umamusume came to exist on
top of that! No words can describe how marvelous
it is! ☆ This is all to say that—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Er, sorry. I'm really not following you at all...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I'm getting pretty sleepy all of a
sudden... for some... reason...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Where am I?!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Welcome, Nature! ☆ This is the Marvelous
Dimension! ★

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Are you in search of glimmering marvelousness?
Or perhaps pure marvelousness?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Uh? Actually, I don't think I'm in search of ei—

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Wow! You're so honest! So cool! So brave!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
I shall grant you a reward! ☆ For such honesty, I
bestow upon you the world's most radiant
marvelousness! ★

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Look, I still don't get what you're rambling on
about. This is actually kind of cree—wait! Am I
dreaming?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Uh, huh? Looks like I'm back.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Good morning, Nature! ★ You looked so
marvelous while you were asleep! ☆

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
All my talk of marvelous things must have
soothed you into a marvelous slumber. ☆
Ahaha! ★ Ahahaha! ☆

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ahaha... Marvelousness... Scary stuff.
